properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have always dreamed to be that superhero To fly right in and somehow save the day And I have always wanted to be more than I could be But seemed to fall and somehow lose my way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But the day Your love stepped in Was the day my life began

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 'Cause You'll make me shine, You'll make me soar You'll make me everything I never was and so much more You give me strength, You let me stand And I don't have to move a mountain but I know I can 'Cause You make me the best man, ooh yeah

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Even through my weakness, You know who I am And You give me amazing grace that I don't understand And there are no words that could ever describe The glory of the beauty of You in my life

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Because You gave Your love to me I'm the best that I can be

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: 'Cause You make me shine, You make me soar You make me everything I never was and so much more You give me strength, You let me stand And I don't have to move a mountain but I know I can 'Cause You make me the best man

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I will never be the same 'Cause You have changed everything From the man I was To the man that's standing by Your side

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: 'Cause You'll make me shine, You'll make me soar You'll make me everything I never was and so much more You give me strength, You let me stand And I don't have to move a mountain but I know I can 'Cause You make me Oh, 'cause You make me the best man

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh, the best man, yeah yeah
